title: Venture Blueprint Builders — Day 1
theme: Build the foundation of your Venture Blueprint™
learningObjectives: Distinguish entrepreneurship from traditional employment in financial services
Articulate personal ambition, purpose, and values using SPIKE venture builder frameworks
Map squad roles, advisory dyads, and research squad expectations for Segment 1
Identify first portfolio and business plan outputs for Week 1
expectedOutputs: Completed ambition, purpose, and values builders
Squad charter with research and advisory roles assigned
Orientation reflection draft for portfolio Identity & Purpose section
portfolioDeliverables: Orientation reflection — why you are building a financial venture
Dream board snapshot or narrative summary from squad activity
businessPlanIntegration: Draft opening narrative for Business Plan Chapter 1: Ambition & Purpose
